response.justification: Candidate brings 15+ years of polyglot full-stack experience, current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq, and prior high-throughput micro-services work at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume does not clearly demonstrate Staff-level technical strategy ownership at scale, the must-have Python expertise is absent from the skills list, and distributed-systems depth appears limited to one role years ago. A screening conversation could clarify Python proficiency, scale of recent systems, and strategic scope.
strengths: Current hands-on work with AI agents, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks
Past experience with high-throughput micro-services handling millions of requests/second at Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, founding open-source platform
concerns: Python not listed in skills — a must-have for the role
Limited evidence of staff-level technical strategy, stakeholder coordination, or on-call leadership
Distributed-systems depth largely tied to one role (2018–2020); recent work skews product/full-stack rather than infra-scale

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
Unclear staff-level strategy and distributed-systems scope
